parameters.query:
(SELECT id, channel, content
 FROM t_content_generation.linkedin_posts
 WHERE channel = 'individual'
   AND is_approved = TRUE
   AND is_scheduled = TRUE
   AND is_published = FALSE
   AND published_at IS NULL
   AND scheduled_at <= NOW()
 ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
 LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT id, channel, content
 FROM t_content_generation.linkedin_posts
 WHERE channel = 'databiz'
   AND is_approved = TRUE
   AND is_scheduled = TRUE
   AND is_published = FALSE
   AND published_at IS NULL
   AND scheduled_at <= NOW()
 ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
 LIMIT 1);

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { author: 'urn:li:person:' + $json.memberUrn, commentary: $json.content, visibility: 'PUBLIC', distribution: { feedDistribution: 'MAIN_FEED', targetEntities: [], thirdPartyDistributionChannels: [] }, lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', isReshareDisabledByAuthor: false } }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE t_content_generation.linkedin_posts
SET status = 'published',
    is_published = TRUE,
    published_at = NOW(),
    external_post_id = '{{ $json.headers["x-restli-id"] || "" }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Prepare Individual Post').first().json.post_id }}
RETURNING id, channel, content;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { content: $json.content, platforms: [ { platform: 'linkedin', accountId: $json.accountId } ], publishNow: true } }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE t_content_generation.linkedin_posts
SET status = 'published',
    is_published = TRUE,
    published_at = NOW(),
    external_post_id = '{{ $json.id || $json.postId || "" }}',
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $('Resolve Account ID').first().json.post_id }}
RETURNING id, channel, content;
